violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of orange biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized, and bagged ice will be used. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

Turkey, which was previously cooked and cooled, was not reheated, found at 60 degrees Fahrenheit in hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

The door to the outside, located in the dock area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer, utensil storage bin, portion cup & lids bins, Camelot refrigerator, and a portable fan have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025
Two lights beneath the hood were nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (texture dicer, spoon) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Pasta and pasta salad, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per staff, pasta, pasta salad and crab were prepared this morning and placed in covered containers greater that 4 inches deep. Pasta and pasta salad were disposed, crab salad was placed on sheet pans to complete cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer and stand mixer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Staff cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
